description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a deploy job that runs on all branches except tags (except: tags) and executes the following commands in order: apt-get update && apt-get install -y lftp; npm install --unsafe-perm -g @angular/cli@1.7.0; npm install --unsafe-perm; npm install typescript@latest; ng build —prod —aot=false —build-optimizer=false; mkdir ~/.lftp/; echo "set ssl:verify-certificate no" >> ~/.lftp/rc; lftp -c "set ftp:ssl-allow no; open -u $FTP_USERNAME,$FTP_PASSWORD $FTP_HOST; mirror -Rev dist/ ./ --ignore-time --parallel=10 --exclude-glob .git* --exclude .git/". The job uploads the built Angular application to an FTP server using the FTP_USERNAME, FTP_PASSWORD, and FTP_HOST variables. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
